name: anti-poisoning runs as a gate before pattern extraction is committed to the corpus
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"author":"alice"}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/extract-pipeline.sh" --pattern pat.json --dry-run --emit pipeline 2>out.txt && grep -q 'step1=safeguards' out.txt && grep -q 'step2=extract' out.txt && grep -q 'order=safeguards-before-extract' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
